basics.name: Florian Nagel
basics.label: Software & Mobile-Entwickler · Design Systems · UX Designer
basics.summary: Software & Mobile developer with experience in iOS/Swift, React/Next.js, Node/NestJS, AWS/Kafka/Kubernetes, and UX/Design Systems. Led teams, shipped apps and data products, and facilitated design sprints.

work.name: Freelancer / Selbständig
work.summary: Freelance software engineering and product/UX work across mobile, web, and cloud.
highlights: Lead Developer (Coachhub): React/Next.js, NestJS microservices, AWS, Kafka, Kubernetes; Scrum/Kanban; requirements & releases; team onboarding and planning.
Design Systems and web relaunch projects (e.g., Auerswald) with Storybook and modern CSS toolchains.
Mobile AR app and CMS dashboard projects; iOS Swift development and prototyping.

work.name: Creative Spielraum UG
work.summary: Founded and led a studio delivering mobile apps, web apps, and UX/design system work.

work.name: Coachhub GmbH
work.summary: Lead Developer across platform initiatives; domain-driven design and event migration; multi-tenancy; secure file upload; component-based and design system integrations.
highlights: NestJS DDD migration and Kafka integration
Secure file upload feature and component-based integrations
Design System integrations, team onboarding and planning

work.name: Steffen & Bach GmbH
work.summary: Web applications and dashboards for enterprise clients.
highlights: Statistics Dashboard: HTML5/CSS, PHP/MySQL; data visualization with animated charts; executive-level analytics (2017).
Customer Service Portal: Fleet management dashboard; B2B registration and credit tracking; CodeIgniter/PHP/MySQL (2017).
